final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of emperor penguins marching across Antarctic ice beneath a massive blue glacier at midnight sun.

Style/medium: National Geographic cover-level nature photography, photorealistic, ultra-wide-angle landscape with wildlife
Composition: ultra-wide-angle panoramic shot, low horizon line emphasizing vastness, foreground close-up of several emperor penguins with crisp feather detail, mid-ground showing hundreds of penguins in formation marching across sea ice, background massive glacier wall
Subject: emperor penguins with black-and-white plumage and orange-yellow beak details, adults with chicks huddled at their feet in intimate family groupings
Scene/backdrop: Antarctica near Ross Ice Shelf, colossal blue glacier with visible ice crevasses emitting mysterious blue glow, distant icebergs floating on calm polar waters, midnight sun hovering near horizon
Lighting/mood: polar midnight sun casting ethereal pale golden light across the scene, soft diffused illumination with warm-cool color interplay, serene yet awe-inspiring atmosphere
Color palette: dominant deep blues of glacier ranging from pale ice blue to rich sapphire, warm pale gold sky tones, crisp black-and-white penguin plumage with orange beak accents
Materials/textures: crystalline ice surfaces with visible depth layers, individual penguin feathers with natural oil sheen, smooth reflective sea ice
Avoid: oversaturated colors, artificial HDR halos, plastic-looking feathers, deformed penguin anatomy, watermark, 8K stuffer text
